rationale: The pair appears substantively connected: the citing paper explicitly frames itself as extending prior subgoal/debt-management research and tests closely related constructs (accounts settled vs dollars settled) in a real debt-settlement field context. The cited paper is a core debt-management psychology study introducing debt account aversion and subgoal-based repayment behavior, and the DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.48.SPL.S38), so this is not an incidental background mention.
